title: Hardware decision memo (Path C lock per blockers.md §3 user-signed reconciliation)

artifacts.rationale: Procurement-quote PDF deferred to Phase 4 entry per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing user-signed reconciliation 2026-05-02. Path C selection requires no early procurement; quote engages only when user signs OVH BHS H200 reservation at Phase 4 entry (~2026-08-10).

Bakeoff against live OVH BHS H200 cluster; Phase-4-deferred. Cannot run in Phase 0 (no live cluster, no procurement). Will populate at Phase 4.4 benchmark step. Documented explicitly in docs/hardware_decision.md §5 Required artifacts table.

open_bugs.summary: Two task_0_6 required_artifacts (.private/hardware_quote_*.pdf, tests/hardware/bakeoff_results.json) are NOT produced by this prep. They are explicitly deferred to Phase 4 entry per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing. Task 0.6 full GREEN re-asserts at Phase 4 entry when those artifacts land alongside the OVH reservation.
criteria_deferred: Phase 4: Generate .private/hardware_quote_*.pdf when user engages OVH Sales for 8× H200 BHS reservation
Phase 4.4: Populate tests/hardware/bakeoff_results.json against live cluster
open_bugs.resolution_path: Phase 4 entry (~2026-08-10): user signs OVH reservation → quote PDF lands in .private/. Phase 4.4: bakeoff suite runs against live cluster → results JSON lands. Both feed a fresh task_0_6 verdict that supersedes this prep.

evidence_links.green_criterion: docs/hardware_decision.md committed with: (a) Path C V4 Flash on 8× H200 OVH BHS Canada selected; (b) rationale citing capacity vs marginal-quality tradeoff for Carney scope; (c) capability gap vs V4 Pro acknowledged; (d) reference to blockers.md §3 user-signed canonical reconciliation 2026-05-02; (e) reference to canonical pin SHA
evidence_links.evidence: (a) §1 + §2.3 select Path C with explicit hardware + model variant; (b) §2.3 rationale (capacity > marginal quality); (c) §3 capability gap V4 Flash vs V4 Pro acknowledged in 3 named domains (long-form synthesis, multi-jurisdictional comparison, anti-sycophancy edge cases); (d) Header + §1 + §6 + §7 reference blockers.md §3 with full pin SHA `79217137de963bbd5efa7f9d50a440e8047461c6d63c4441afc9e074de04404d`; (e) Header lists full canonical pin SHAs for plan / blockers / matrix / architecture / substrate audit / CLAUDE.md, and document explicitly states canonical_pin.txt composite SHA `5a5afbbaf12c01a4e04d2a710cdbdefebf4faf3ff709c113b3e172149d8878b2`.

evidence_links.green_criterion: Document explicitly notes Path A/B remain documented but NOT selected
evidence_links.evidence: §2.1 Path A 'NOT SELECTED' with cons + selection-blocker. §2.2 Path B 'NOT SELECTED' with cons + selection-blocker (capacity insufficient). Table at §2 marks Path A and B 'NOT selected' explicitly.

evidence_links.green_criterion: Document explicitly notes physical procurement (.private/hardware_quote_*.pdf, tests/hardware/bakeoff_results.json) deferred to Phase 4 entry
evidence_links.evidence: §4 Phase 0 vs Phase 4 separation explicitly states 'No physical procurement during Phase 0–3' and 'Phase 4 entry (~2026-08-10): physical procurement engages.' §5 Required artifacts table explicitly maps .private/hardware_quote_*.pdf to 'Phase-4-deferred (explicit)' and tests/hardware/bakeoff_results.json to 'Phase-4-deferred (explicit). Bakeoff requires live OVH BHS H200 cluster.'

codex_findings_addressed: P1 iter-1: Missing full canonical pin SHA in doc — added `5a5afbbaf12c01a4e04d2a710cdbdefebf4faf3ff709c113b3e172149d8878b2` (composite docs/canonical_pin.txt sha256) in document header; full pin SHAs for all referenced canonical files now present.
P1 iter-1: Missing manifest at outputs/audits/manifests/0_6_hardware_decision_doc.json — this file IS that manifest.

P1 iter-1: Insufficient explicit deferral note for both .private/hardware_quote_*.pdf and tests/hardware/bakeoff_results.json — strengthened §5 Required artifacts table; both are now explicitly listed with 'Phase-4-deferred (explicit)' notation.

P2 iter-1: Doc claimed 'OVH BHS H200 quoted availability' without committed quote — softened to 'Procurement footprint smaller than Path A; OVH H200 page status `Coming soon` per blockers.md §9'. Capacity claim now reads as a target, not a confirmed availability claim.
P2 iter-1: Circular 'signed via Codex APPROVE gate during this iteration' — replaced with reference to the user-signature lock in blockers.md §3 (commit 9bf7907) as the actual signing trail.
substrate_honesty_attestation: Phase-0-PARTIAL-honest framing per Plan v13 §F. This manifest closes the orchestrator-completable portion of task 0.6 — the decision memo. Procurement artifacts (.private/hardware_quote_*.pdf, tests/hardware/bakeoff_results.json) are explicitly Phase-4-deferred per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing user-signed canonical reconciliation 2026-05-02. NOT a silent fallback. Documented in open_bugs[0] with explicit resolution_path.
